name: Quick Start
description: Numbered step cards with code blocks, chat bubbles, or output content showing a getting-started flow. Each card has a vibrant gradient background, a numbered circle badge, a step title, and a content block. Supports tabbed configuration blocks below the cards for framework-specific setup instructions. Ideal for onboarding sections and quick-start guides.

cards.description: 3 cards in a horizontal row, each with a vibrant gradient background (coral, amber, purple). Each card contains: a 40px numbered circle badge with semi-transparent dark background, a bold step title, and a content block that can be a monospace code block (dark semi-transparent bg), a chat bubble (rounded corners, left-aligned), or a terminal output block. Cards lift on hover with colored box-shadow. Below the cards, an optional tabbed config section shows framework-specific code with tab buttons (rounded top corners, active tab highlighted in cyan).

slots.step-number: Badge circle: _w10 _h10 _rounded[50%] _flex _items[center] _justify[center] _fs[1rem] _fw700 _mb4 _bgblack/20 _fgwhite. Displays the step number.
slots.step-title: Step heading with h3 _fs[1rem] _fw700 _mb3 _fgwhite. Brief title like 'Configure', 'Prompt', 'Build'.
slots.step-content: Content area that varies by step type. Code block: _bgblack/30 _rounded[8px] _p3 _mono _fs[0.7rem] _lh[1.7] _overflow[auto] _whitespace[pre] _fgwhite/85. Chat bubble: _bgblack/20 _rounded[10px_10px_10px_2px] _p4 _fs[0.82rem] _lh[1.5] _text[left]. Output block: _bgblack/30 _rounded[8px] _p3 _mono _fs[0.68rem] _lh[1.7] _whitespace[pre] _overflow[auto] _fgwhite/85.

vertical.description: Stacked vertical layout with steps arranged top to bottom instead of side by side. Each step is a full-width card with the same gradient, badge, title, and content structure. Better for mobile-first designs or when step content is longer.

slots.step-content: Content block: code block, chat bubble, or output depending on the step
Code block, chat bubble, or output content
